case_title: ALVIN KAI-JUN SNG VS. NETGEAR, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT NETGEAR, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2021 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED DEC-07-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NETGEAR, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT NETGEAR, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SNG, ALVIN KAI-JUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NETGEAR, INC. $214.84 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $259.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NETGEAR, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $322.26 FILED BY SNG, ALVIN KAI-JUN AS TO DEFENDANT NETGEAR, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ALVIN KAI-JUN SNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NETGEAR, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SHAWN HO, STAFF TECH SUPPORT ENGINEER. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SNG, ALVIN KAI-JUN AS TO DEFENDANT NETGEAR, INC.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER DEFENDANT REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-23-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALVIN KAI-JUN SNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NETGEAR, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ARIONNA LAWSON, CORPORATE COUNSEL. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. DUE TO THE POSITION OF NETGEAR'S REPRESENTATIVE THE COURT COULD NOT ALLOWED THE DEFENDANT TO BE REPRESENTED IN A HEARING, HOWEVER THE HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG ALLOWED THE DEFENDANT A CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
